microsoft_ft: Partnered with enterprise customers (**Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp**) as a trusted technical advisor, scaling Azure's resilience validation program into a platformized solution sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ in business impact**.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill solution in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous validation.

Orchestrated 14 cross-functional recovery executions under executive visibility, including bridge-leading a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, aligning IT, engineering, and customer stakeholders.

Built and demoed an internal **AI agent** to automate planning workflows, cutting cycle time by **39%** and lifting drill capacity by 21% — showcasing connected, agent-driven experiences to leadership and partner teams.

Delivered transformational solution pitches and live product walkthroughs to enterprise customer personas, translating complex distributed-systems architecture into clear business value and path-to-value narratives.

Migrated documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting information lookup time by **83%** and improving the developer experience across the org.

Defined a product strategy to eliminate operational toil during region launches, running discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region and roadmap automation of critical paths.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, equipping leadership with the data to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments.

Facilitated **Agile ceremonies** — sprint planning, backlog grooming, retrospectives — resolving 40+ high-priority tickets and stabilizing the developer intake process for cross-functional engineering teams.
Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering on automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by **25%** and reducing release friction across the robotics platform.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first **go-to-market** strategy across web and Google business profiles.
